prompt: Using the provided reference image as a layout/comparison inspiration, replace the dense Japanese policy infographic with a photorealistic 2×2 comparison collage. Each of the 4 panels should show a different realistic interior view of a modern eyeglasses boutique, with warm retail lighting, shelves full of glasses, wooden cabinetry, display cases, mirrors, and a polished upscale showroom feel. Add one small horizontal orange label near the left side of each panel, using exactly these 4 labels: GPT-Image-2, GPT-Image-1.5, MAI Image 2 Efficient, and Flux.2 Flex. Keep the image as a clean four-quadrant comparison, with no Japanese report text, no diagrams, no government-style boxes, and no extra captions beyond the four orange labels.
